blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
